expectations.text: Confirms CSRD applies citing non-EU company threshold (>€150M EU turnover)
expectations.evidence: Confirms CSRD applies under Art. 40a citing €150M EU turnover threshold

expectations.text: Identifies German subsidiary qualifies as a large EU company
expectations.evidence: German sub: 600 employees qualifies as large company (>250 employees)

expectations.text: States first mandatory reporting year is FY 2028 (published 2029)
expectations.evidence: States "First mandatory reporting year is FY 2028, with the report published in 2029"

expectations.text: Explains EU subsidiary must file ESRS-compliant reports
expectations.evidence: States "EU subsidiaries must file their own ESRS-compliant reports"

expectations.text: Notes equivalence condition — US frameworks not yet recognised as equivalent
expectations.evidence: States equivalence not granted for US: "Commission formally declares a US framework equivalent (which has not occurred)"
